name: Stuffed Artichokes
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup olive oil (this needs to be olive oil -- NO substitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the stems and the tops (just low enough to remove the pointed ends of the leaves) off of the artichokes.
2. Mix the cheese, garlic, and bread crumbs in a bowl.
3. Spread the artichoke leaves so you can fill each layer from the outside in with the crumb mixture.
4. Place the artichokes in a pot with about 1-2 inches of water. Drizzle olive oil and lemon juice over the top of each artichoke.
5. Cover and steam for 45 minutes or longer, checking occasionally that the water has not completely evaporated.
6. The artichokes are done when a leaf can be easily pulled off.
